summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NT Commerce new features: Banking Integration, Notification Bell, PWA files. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load and function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Banking page has proper data-testid attributes for testing
NotificationBell component correctly integrated into Layout.js header
PWA manifest.json and service-worker.js are publicly accessible
Banking summary correctly aggregates account balances and transaction stats
Reconciliation feature properly detects matched vs unmatched balances
seed_data_creation: Created test bank account (CPA - القرض الشعبي الجزائري) with transactions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banking feature fully tested with CRUD operations (accounts, transactions, reconciliation). PWA files accessible at /manifest.json and /service-worker.js. NotificationBell polls /api/notifications/unread-count every 30s. Database is 'ntbass'.

banking_page.stat_cards: PASS - 4 stat cards: Total Balance (55,000 دج), Active Accounts (1), Deposits (25,000 دج), Withdrawals (11,000 دج)
banking_page.accounts_tab: PASS - Shows accounts table with bank details, IBAN, balance
banking_page.transactions_tab: PASS - Shows transactions with type badges, amounts, balance after
banking_page.add_account_dialog: PASS - Opens with form for bank name, account number, IBAN, type, currency, initial balance

banking_api.GET_banking_accounts: PASS - Returns list of bank accounts
banking_api.POST_banking_accounts: PASS - Creates new bank account with auto-generated ID
banking_api.GET_banking_transactions: PASS - Returns transactions list sorted by date
banking_api.POST_banking_transactions: PASS - Creates deposit/withdrawal and updates account balance
banking_api.GET_banking_summary: PASS - Returns aggregated stats (total_balance, active_accounts, transaction_summary)
banking_api.POST_banking_reconcile: PASS - Reconciles account with matched/unmatched status

notification_bell.component_in_header: PASS - NotificationBell rendered in Layout.js header
notification_bell.panel_opens: PASS - Clicking bell opens notification panel

pwa_files.manifest_json: PASS - /manifest.json accessible, returns valid JSON with name='NT Commerce - منصة محاسبة ذكية'
pwa_files.install_button: PASS - Install app button visible in header (تثبيت)

saas_admin.tenant_count: PASS - Shows 1 total tenant, 1 active tenant
saas_admin.tenant_list: PASS - NCR Commercial listed with professional plan

existing_features.whatsapp_page: PASS - /whatsapp loads with config and stats

mocked_apis.WhatsApp_Business_API: MOCKED - Messages logged to DB but not sent via Meta API
